title: palicourea corniculata
intro: Palicourea corniculata, also known as the 'false quinine', is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Palicourea corniculata are primarily attributed to its alkaloid content, which has shown potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, malaria, and other diseases. In traditional medicine, Palicourea corniculata is often prepared into teas, infusions, and extracts for consumption, and its herbal preparations are also used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
